message:
security: Fix timing attack and weak RNG vulnerabilities

1. Admin token comparison (HIGH PRIORITY):
   - Changed from `!==` to constant-time comparison using timingSafeEqual
   - Prevents timing attacks that could leak admin token information
   - Added safeCompareTokens() helper with proper length-differing handling

2. Share link code generation (MEDIUM PRIORITY):
   - Replaced Math.random() with crypto.randomBytes()
   - Share links are security-sensitive and need unpredictable codes
   - Fixed both initial generation and collision fallback

3. Referral code generation (MEDIUM PRIORITY):
   - Replaced Math.random() with crypto.randomBytes()
   - Consistent with share link security improvements
   - Fixed both initial generation and collision fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
